      "question": "What is the target related to life within planetary boundaries under the 17SDG?",
      "options": ["A) To halve the global fertility rate by 2050", "B) To keep in check the rate of natural resource depletion", "C) To reverse biodiversity loss", "D) To reduce greenhouse gas emissions"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "The target is to keep in check the rate of natural resource depletion to ensure that the Earth's ecosystems are maintained and
